title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Shukrana
desc: Shukrana, a young girl, must deal with her conservative family while also dealing with Shehroz, a crazed lover.

title: Harjeeta
desc: Harjeet Singh is a young man raised in poverty who dreams of joining the Indian national field hockey team and winning the World Cup.

title: Laavaan Phere
desc: A young man falls in love with a woman and decides to marry her. However, his brothers-in-law and the bride's hot-headed father create complications.

title: Gaddi Jaandi Ae Chalaangaan Maardi
desc: Happy juggles reconciling his love for Pooja with his father's materialistic aspirations. However, he finds himself in hilariously chaotic scenarios after receiving a modest car in dowry.

title: Nikka Zaildar 4
desc: A carefree Punjabi man uninterested in wrestling finds his world turned around when he encounters a spirited Haryanvi woman whose passion reshapes his journey.
